markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss automation opportunities and strategize on high-impact projects for DeepGram's growth.](https://fathom.video/share/Xe_vy3dSJBoQ7enX3zwzipUEQmrPwYZa?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [The team identified a need for more advanced, personalized content creation and ABM strategies beyond current capabilities](https://fathom.video/share/Xe_vy3dSJBoQ7enX3zwzipUEQmrPwYZa?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)
  - [There's potential for developing custom landing pages and voice agent experiences for high-value target accounts](https://fathom.video/share/Xe_vy3dSJBoQ7enX3zwzipUEQmrPwYZa?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)
  - [A project to create 100 personalized pages for top accounts, coupled with coordinated outbound campaigns, was proposed as a high-impact initiative](https://fathom.video/share/Xe_vy3dSJBoQ7enX3zwzipUEQmrPwYZa?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Topics

### Current Challenges and Opportunities

  - [Marcel expressed feeling underutilized and seeking ways to provide more value to DeepGram](https://fathom.video/share/Xe_vy3dSJBoQ7enX3zwzipUEQmrPwYZa?tab=summary&timestamp=100.0)
  - [Bill acknowledged the team is in a phase of seeing many opportunities but risks analysis paralysis](https://fathom.video/share/Xe_vy3dSJBoQ7enX3zwzipUEQmrPwYZa?tab=summary&timestamp=217.0)
  - [Identified need to focus on high-impact projects that can significantly influence DeepGram's trajectory](https://fathom.video/share/Xe_vy3dSJBoQ7enX3zwzipUEQmrPwYZa?tab=summary&timestamp=234.0)

### Keyword Research and Paid Search Optimization

  - [Bill shared a proof of concept for generating targeted keywords based on sales data](https://fathom.video/share/Xe_vy3dSJBoQ7enX3zwzipUEQmrPwYZa?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)
  - [Process involves analyzing sales-accepted leads, grouping by use case, and using LLMs to generate search term ideas](https://fathom.video/share/Xe_vy3dSJBoQ7enX3zwzipUEQmrPwYZa?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)
  - [Discussion on the limitations of this approach, including the need to filter for volume and create matching landing pages](https://fathom.video/share/Xe_vy3dSJBoQ7enX3zwzipUEQmrPwYZa?tab=summary&timestamp=406.0)

### Programmatic Page Creation and Personalization

  - [Proposed creating highly personalized ABM pages for target companies](https://fathom.video/share/Xe_vy3dSJBoQ7enX3zwzipUEQmrPwYZa?tab=summary&timestamp=460.0)
  - [Discussed the potential of embedding custom voice agent experiences on these pages](https://fathom.video/share/Xe_vy3dSJBoQ7enX3zwzipUEQmrPwYZa?tab=summary&timestamp=710.0)
  - [Compared capabilities to tools like Mutiny, highlighting DeepGram's potential for more advanced customization](https://fathom.video/share/Xe_vy3dSJBoQ7enX3zwzipUEQmrPwYZa?tab=summary&timestamp=1039.0)

### Outbound Campaign Strategy

  - [Suggested focusing on high-value enterprise targets with custom pages and coordinated outbound campaigns](https://fathom.video/share/Xe_vy3dSJBoQ7enX3zwzipUEQmrPwYZa?tab=summary&timestamp=1200.0)
  - [Discussed success of similar strategies with other clients, achieving 30% response rates](https://fathom.video/share/Xe_vy3dSJBoQ7enX3zwzipUEQmrPwYZa?tab=summary&timestamp=1224.0)
  - [Proposed creating 100 pages for top accounts as an MVP, not necessarily indexed but used for targeted outreach](https://fathom.video/share/Xe_vy3dSJBoQ7enX3zwzipUEQmrPwYZa?tab=summary&timestamp=1500.0)

### Voice Agent Demo Integration

  - [Bill mentioned the ability to pre-fill URL prompts for voice agent demos](https://fathom.video/share/Xe_vy3dSJBoQ7enX3zwzipUEQmrPwYZa?tab=summary&timestamp=1564.0)
  - [Discussed incorporating this feature into personalized landing pages for a powerful demonstration of DeepGram's capabilities](https://fathom.video/share/Xe_vy3dSJBoQ7enX3zwzipUEQmrPwYZa?tab=summary&timestamp=1710.0)

### Project Scoping and Next Steps

  - [Agreed to brainstorm on the personalized page project with Marcel, Alexa, and potentially Bill](https://fathom.video/share/Xe_vy3dSJBoQ7enX3zwzipUEQmrPwYZa?tab=summary&timestamp=1652.0)
  - [Aim to launch before the end of the year, utilizing existing page templates and tools like Brand Fetch for logos](https://fathom.video/share/Xe_vy3dSJBoQ7enX3zwzipUEQmrPwYZa?tab=summary&timestamp=1657.0)
  - [Discussed creating content for 100 pages and developing a corresponding outbound campaign strategy](https://fathom.video/share/Xe_vy3dSJBoQ7enX3zwzipUEQmrPwYZa?tab=summary&timestamp=1715.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Marcel to be given access to DeepGram's Notion workspace for better visibility into ongoing projects](https://fathom.video/share/Xe_vy3dSJBoQ7enX3zwzipUEQmrPwYZa?tab=summary&timestamp=1424.0)
  - [Marcel, Alexa, and potentially Bill to scope out the personalized page project for top 100 accounts](https://fathom.video/share/Xe_vy3dSJBoQ7enX3zwzipUEQmrPwYZa?tab=summary&timestamp=1652.0)
  - [Investigate the integration of voice agent demos into personalized landing pages](https://fathom.video/share/Xe_vy3dSJBoQ7enX3zwzipUEQmrPwYZa?tab=summary&timestamp=1710.0)
  - [Develop a strategy for creating and launching 100 personalized pages before year-end](https://fathom.video/share/Xe_vy3dSJBoQ7enX3zwzipUEQmrPwYZa?tab=summary&timestamp=1715.0)
  - [Plan coordinated outbound campaigns to leverage the new personalized pages](https://fathom.video/share/Xe_vy3dSJBoQ7enX3zwzipUEQmrPwYZa?tab=summary&timestamp=1715.0)
  - [Evaluate the potential for using AI-generated custom video content in outreach efforts](https://fathom.video/share/Xe_vy3dSJBoQ7enX3zwzipUEQmrPwYZa?tab=summary&timestamp=1746.0)
